name: Calculadora de Pintura
seo_title: Calculadora de Pintura – Litros y Botes Necesarios
seo_description: Calcula cuántos litros y botes de pintura necesitas. Introduce las dimensiones de la habitación, el número de manos y el tipo de pintura para obtener la cantidad exacta.
description: Calculadora 1111. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Total wall area: 4 × 14 m × 2.5 m = 140 m² (for a square room — adjust for actual perimeter)
Subtract doors/windows: 3 × 2 m² = 6 m² → 134 m² paintable
mistakes: Using the floor area instead of the wall area
Forgetting that dark colours or stained walls need 3 coats instead of 2
Not accounting for texture — rough or porous walls absorb 20-30% more paint
formula_display: Paintable area = (perimeter × height) - doors_windows; Litres = area × coats ÷ coverage_per_litre
